fields.summary: Draws a bitmap at the specified point using the specified sampling options.

params.paint: The paint to use when drawing, or <see langword="null" /> for default paint.
params.p: The point at which to draw the upper-left corner of the bitmap.
params.sampling: The sampling options to use when scaling.

entries.signature: public void DrawBitmap (SkiaSharp.SKBitmap bitmap, SkiaSharp.SKPoint p, SkiaSharp.SKSamplingOptions sampling, SkiaSharp.SKPaint paint = default);

fields.summary: Draws a bitmap into the destination rectangle using the specified sampling options.

params.sampling: The sampling options to use when scaling.
params.paint: The paint to use when drawing, or <see langword="null" /> for default paint.

entries.signature: public void DrawBitmap (SkiaSharp.SKBitmap bitmap, SkiaSharp.SKRect dest, SkiaSharp.SKSamplingOptions sampling, SkiaSharp.SKPaint paint = default);

fields.summary: Draws a sub-region of a bitmap into the destination rectangle using the specified sampling options.

params.source: The source rectangle within the bitmap.
params.sampling: The sampling options to use when scaling.
params.paint: The paint to use when drawing, or <see langword="null" /> for default paint.
params.dest: The destination rectangle on the canvas.

entries.signature: public void DrawBitmap (SkiaSharp.SKBitmap bitmap, SkiaSharp.SKRect source, SkiaSharp.SKRect dest, SkiaSharp.SKSamplingOptions sampling, SkiaSharp.SKPaint paint = default);

fields.summary: Draws a bitmap at the specified coordinates using the specified sampling options.

params.paint: The paint to use when drawing, or <see langword="null" /> for default paint.
params.y: The y-coordinate of the upper-left corner of the bitmap.
params.x: The x-coordinate of the upper-left corner of the bitmap.
params.sampling: The sampling options to use when scaling.

entries.signature: public void DrawBitmap (SkiaSharp.SKBitmap bitmap, float x, float y, SkiaSharp.SKSamplingOptions sampling, SkiaSharp.SKPaint paint = default);

fields.summary: Draws a surface at the specified point using the specified sampling options.

params.paint: The paint to use when drawing, or <see langword="null" /> for default paint.
params.p: The point at which to draw the upper-left corner of the surface.
params.sampling: The sampling options to use when scaling.

entries.signature: public void DrawSurface (SkiaSharp.SKSurface surface, SkiaSharp.SKPoint p, SkiaSharp.SKSamplingOptions sampling, SkiaSharp.SKPaint paint = default);

fields.summary: Draws a surface at the specified coordinates using the specified sampling options.

params.paint: The paint to use when drawing, or <see langword="null" /> for default paint.
params.y: The y-coordinate of the upper-left corner of the surface.
params.x: The x-coordinate of the upper-left corner of the surface.
params.sampling: The sampling options to use when scaling.

entries.signature: public void DrawSurface (SkiaSharp.SKSurface surface, float x, float y, SkiaSharp.SKSamplingOptions sampling, SkiaSharp.SKPaint paint = default);
public void DrawText (string text, SkiaSharp.SKPoint p, SkiaSharp.SKFont font, SkiaSharp.SKPaint paint);

fields.summary: Draws text at the specified point using the provided font and paint.

params.font: The font to use when drawing the text.
params.paint: The paint to use when drawing the text.
params.p: The point at which to draw the text origin.

entries.obsolete: [System.Obsolete("Use DrawText(string text, SKPoint p, SKTextAlign textAlign, SKFont font, SKPaint paint) instead.", false)]

entries.signature: public void DrawText (string text, float x, float y, SkiaSharp.SKFont font, SkiaSharp.SKPaint paint);

fields.summary: Draws text at the specified coordinates using the provided font and paint.

params.y: The y-coordinate of the text origin.
params.paint: The paint to use when drawing the text.
params.x: The x-coordinate of the text origin.
params.font: The font to use when drawing the text.

entries.obsolete: [System.Obsolete("Use DrawText(string text, float x, float y, SKTextAlign textAlign, SKFont font, SKPaint paint) instead.", false)]
